meta.title: Justin Li | Vancouver Real Estate
meta.description: Vancouver REALTOR® Justin C. Li PREC — delivering precision results for buyers and sellers across Greater Vancouver's most sought-after neighbourhoods.

agent.name: Justin Li
agent.title: REALTOR® PREC
agent.subheadline: Medallion Award recipient and trusted Vancouver specialist with a track record of exceptional results for buyers and sellers.

about.label: ABOUT JUSTIN
about.heading:
Local expertise.
Exceptional results.
paragraphs: Justin C. Li is a REALTOR® and Personal Real Estate Corporation based in Vancouver, BC, with a reputation built on precision, discretion, and results. A recipient of the MLS Medallion Award — recognising the top 10% of REALTORS® at the Real Estate Board of Greater Vancouver — Justin brings a level of dedication and market intelligence that sets him apart.

Specialising in Vancouver's premier residential market, Justin works closely with both buyers and sellers to navigate complex transactions with confidence. His approach is rooted in genuine client advocacy: understanding what matters most to you, then delivering it.

From Coal Harbour's waterfront towers to the character homes of Kitsilano and everything in between, Justin's deep familiarity with Greater Vancouver's most coveted neighbourhoods gives his clients a meaningful edge.

credentials.label: MLS Medallion Award
credentials.detail: Recognised by the Real Estate Board of Greater Vancouver for outstanding sales achievement.

credentials.label: Personal Real Estate Corporation
credentials.detail: Operating as a licensed Personal Real Estate Corporation for professional, accountable service.

credentials.label: Vancouver Specialist
credentials.detail: Deep market knowledge across Greater Vancouver's most sought-after residential neighbourhoods.

items.title: Buyer Representation
items.subtitle: Find your ideal Vancouver home
items.description: Justin guides buyers through Greater Vancouver's competitive market with clarity and confidence — identifying the right property, negotiating effectively, and protecting your interests at every stage.
items.detail: From first viewing to final keys, Justin's thorough due diligence and market knowledge ensure you buy with certainty.

items.title: Seller Strategy
items.subtitle: Maximum value for your property
items.description: A precisely executed listing strategy — expert pricing, compelling presentation, and targeted marketing — to attract qualified buyers and achieve the best possible result for your home.
items.detail: Justin's Medallion Award track record reflects a consistent ability to sell well in any market condition.

items.title: Investment Properties
items.subtitle: Build your Vancouver portfolio
items.description: Whether acquiring your first rental property or expanding an existing portfolio, Justin provides the market intelligence and investment perspective needed to make well-informed decisions in Vancouver's dynamic real estate landscape.
items.detail: Vancouver's rental market and long-term appreciation profile make it one of Canada's most compelling investment destinations.

quote.text: Vancouver rewards those who truly know it. Every neighbourhood has its own rhythm — and its own opportunity.

items.name: Michael T.
items.quote: Justin was exceptional throughout our entire purchase. His knowledge of the Vancouver condo market is genuinely impressive — he found us the right unit at the right price.

items.name: Sarah K.
items.quote: We sold our Kitsilano home with Justin and couldn't be happier. He priced it perfectly and had multiple offers within days. Truly professional from start to finish.

items.name: David & Amy L.
items.quote: Justin made our first home purchase feel effortless. He was patient, thorough, and always had our best interests in mind. Highly recommend.

listings.pageSubheadline: A selection of Vancouver's finest residential properties. Contact Justin for current availability and pricing.

footer.tagline: Precision. Results. Vancouver. Serving Coal Harbour, Yaletown, Kitsilano, West Vancouver, False Creek, and all of Greater Vancouver.
